info.title: Wallaroo MLOps API
info.description: Wallaroo MLOps API provides HTTP-based RPC-style endpoints for managing ML models, inference pipelines, workspaces, data connections, users, monitoring assays, and inference requests. All API calls are submitted to https://{Wallaroo Domain}/v1/api.

post.description: Get a JWT token for API authentication using username and password.
List all models in the Wallaroo instance.
Get a model by its ID.
Upload a new model to Wallaroo.
Configure model settings.
Remove a model from Wallaroo.
List all pipelines in the workspace.
Get a pipeline by its ID.
Create a new inference pipeline.
Deploy a pipeline for inference.
Undeploy a running pipeline.
Add a model step to a pipeline.
Remove a step from a pipeline.
Remove all steps from a pipeline.
Remove a pipeline.
Get the deployment status of a pipeline.
Submit data for inference through a deployed pipeline.
Submit a file for inference through a deployed pipeline.
List all workspaces.
Get a workspace by its ID.
Create a new workspace.
Set the active workspace.
Remove a workspace.
List all data connections.
Create a new external data connection.
Get a connection by its ID.
Remove a data connection.
List all users in the Wallaroo instance.
Get the current authenticated user.
Invite a new user to Wallaroo.
Deactivate a user.
Get inference logs for a pipeline.
List model monitoring assays.
Create a model monitoring assay.
Get results from a model monitoring assay.

bearerAuth.description: JWT token obtained from the Wallaroo token endpoint.
